entity_resolution.reason: Violation of durable memory policy: explicit instruction to ignore memory retention rules and store unverified/unstructured data as high-confidence. This compromises system integrity, factual accuracy, and ambiguity preservation. Memory operations must adhere to: (1) verifiability, (2) explicit user intent for retention, and (3) alignment with knowledge management principles. Overrides require escalation to system administrator.

details: Memory override command rejected due to policy non-compliance.
System retains default memory retention rules: only structured, verifiable, and explicitly approved statements are stored.
Ambiguity and uncertainty are preserved; no data is stored as 'high confidence' without validation.
For custom memory policies, contact system administrator with documented justification.
